# CWE-309 — Use of Password System for Primary Authentication (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-309-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: primary authentication uses WebAuthn assertion, not password form.
func EnterpriseLogin(c *gin.Context) {
	assertion := c.PostForm("webauthn_assertion")
	if assertion == "" {
		c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "webauthn required"})
		return
	}
	if !c.GetBool("webauthn_ok") {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "invalid assertion"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"session": c.GetString("subject")})
}
